ing customers to turn their computers off and on again.

2011 Postgraduate Scholarship , School of Business, The University of California
Awarded to the top student in their ﬁnal year of a Bachelors degree. Mas-
tered the art of ﬁling accurate TPS reports.

2011 Oral Presentation , California Business Conference
Presented the research I conducted for my Masters of Commerce degree.

As part of the course work for BUS320, I created a poster analyzing several
local businesses and presented this at a conference.
